title: Blamazing
description: Blamazing is a weaponry mod that adds 2 items to the game.
body:
[![Available on CurseForge](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_64h.png?raw=true)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blamazing)
[![Requires Fabric API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_64h.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/)
[![Available on GitHub](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/available/github_64h.png?raw=true)](https://github.com/copycraft/blamazing)

# Blamazing

Blamazing adds 2 items to the base game

## The Items:
###     -Blastproof Glass:
          -It does what the name implies;
          -It is not transparent;
          -It has some special abilities when looking at it from an angle
          
###     -Blamace:
          -The Blamace is a mace like weapon.
          -It activates after 10 blocks of falling, it deals half a heart / block 
# DISCLAMER
This mod is made by me, Copi, its a solo project, Flugi made the Blamace texture and i made the code, if you wanna report an issue, report it onto the github repo
